sections.instruction: Questions 21-23: Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 24-30: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.

questions.content: Steve’s mark could have been better if he had
options: A not made mistakes in his project.
B done a better book review.
D chosen a different topic for his project.

questions.content: Steve’s book review was
options: B not as good as his project.

questions.content: Steve’s tutor criticizes which aspect of his project?
options: B the argument about road pricing

questions.content: The tutor recommends that Frances should do
options: A a PhD but not an MPhil.
B an MPhil or a PhD.

questions.content: As regards getting funding, the tutor thinks Frances’s
options: B chances are greater than many other students’.
C exam results will be decisive.
D chances are better now than in the past.

questions.content: The last time a student in the department achieved a first in their exams was
options: D in the first three years the college was open.

questions.content: Steve does not plan to go on to do research because he wants to
options: B do lots of really exciting things.
C earn some money to do the things he would like to do.
